creator: jumper99@gmx.de
text:
Unfortunately snmpd still seems to have a memory leak, after starting the 
deamon it used 27MB, currently it is using 195MB which i guess is too much.

[helmut@BSDHelmut ~]$ ps auxww | grep /usr/local/sbin/snmpd
root      32226  0.0  8.3 195260 172112  ??  S    Thu08PM  30:41.36 
/usr/local/sbin/snmpd -p /var/run/snmpd.pid
[helmut@BSDHelmut ~]$
